## Summary

Describe the problem and the change clearly.

## Checklist

- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `Docs/` for public API or behavior changes
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` for user-visible changes
- [ ] Verified CI-relevant flows locally when practical (`swift test`, demo build, or E2E path)

## Notes

Include migration notes, tradeoffs, or follow-up work if needed.
